title: Digital Health Data Risk Score
description: Schema for the risk score returned by RGA's Digital Health Data (DHD) scoring API based on structured electronic medical record and claims data.

requestId.description: Unique identifier for this scoring request.

applicationId.description: Identifier of the insurance application being scored.

scoreDate.description: Timestamp when the risk score was generated.

riskScore.description: Calculated risk score. Higher values indicate higher risk.

riskCategory.description: Risk category derived from the score.

scoreConfidence.description: Confidence level of the score from 0.0 to 1.0.

dataAvailability.description: Summary of data sources available for scoring.

ehrDataAvailable.description: Whether electronic health record data was available.

claimsDataAvailable.description: Whether medical claims data was available.

rxDataAvailable.description: Whether prescription drug data was available.

labDataAvailable.description: Whether lab result data was available.

healthSignals.description: Key health signals that contributed to the risk score.

description.description: Human-readable description of the health signal.

riskContribution.description: Contribution of this signal to the overall risk score.

recommendation.description: Underwriting action recommendation based on the score.

processingTimeMs.description: Time in milliseconds to process and return the score.
